name: Quantum Convergence
effect_text: Once per match. All your Weapons gain Priority Fire, Alpha Strike, Critical Strike this turn.
flavor_text: Probability bends. The universe blinks. You win, at once, quietly.

name: Reality Collapse
effect_text: Once per match. Swap total HP (shield+hull) with target enemy ship.
flavor_text: Collapse a region of spacetime to your will. The universe complies, briefly.

name: Quantum Core: Singularity
effect_text: Passive: Once per match, play any card from your hand for 0 energy. That card cannot be Negated.
flavor_text: The probability of this working exactly once is perfect. The second time is improbable.

name: Star-Eater
effect_text: Priority Fire. Breach Cascade. Overflow Fire. Radiation Leak. Deal 32; adjacent 10; 8 radiation; once per match.
flavor_text: Older than the fleet. Older than the star it eats. Older than memory, still hungry.

name: The First and Last
effect_text: Persistent Field. Your units gain +3/+3 and all Part-9 keywords are active on your units.
flavor_text: The first subroutine ever compiled. Still running. Still the last one compiled anywhere.

name: Worldbreaker
effect_text: Priority Fire. Critical Strike. Rapid Launch. Breach Cascade.
flavor_text: Named by a treaty the fleet no longer recognizes. The treaty still objects, quietly.

name: Extinction
effect_text: Once per match. Destroy all enemy Drones and deal 15 damage to the enemy ship.
flavor_text: The briefcase the fleet stops using after the first time. The pilot keeps the paperwork.

name: Time Lord
effect_text: Once per match. Take an extra full turn after this one.
flavor_text: One minute longer than the rules allow. One minute the enemy does not get.

name: The Infinite
effect_text: Persistent Field. Cascading Power. Chain Catalyst. Linked Fire. Efficiency Protocol.
flavor_text: Runs on no processor the fleet can point at. Still runs. Still pays attention.

name: Genesis
effect_text: Environmental. Your units gain +2/+2, Priority Fire, and Auto-Repair 2. Replaces any active Environmental.
flavor_text: A region the fleet remembered. The fleet forgot. The fleet rebuilt, patient.

name: Oblivion
effect_text: Phase Drive. Critical Strike. Overflow Fire. Deal 28; bypass blockers; destroy target subsystem.
flavor_text: Nothing left where the shot was aimed. Nothing asked where the shot came from.

name: Apex Pilot Core
effect_text: Passive: Your units gain +1/+1. Once per match, draw 3 cards and gain 3 energy.
flavor_text: The core the ace sleeps on. The ace never leaves. The ship never loses.

name: The Last Card
effect_text: Once per match. Endgame Protocol. If your deck has 10 or fewer cards, draw 4 and gain 5 energy.
flavor_text: Only shown when the deck is nearly empty. The deck was nearly empty on purpose.

name: Infinity Gate
effect_text: Environmental. Once per match. All your units gain Phase Drive and Priority Fire for 3 turns.
flavor_text: A doorway that opens only for the pilot who already knows the knock.

name: Event Horizon
effect_text: Interceptor. Gain Stealth. Phase Drive. Critical Breach: deal 15 damage when destroyed.
flavor_text: Goes past the horizon once. Returns with something nobody asked it to bring back.

name: The Unmaker
effect_text: Priority Fire. Critical Strike. Radiation Leak. Overflow Fire. Deal 30; excess to ship; 8 radiation.
flavor_text: Not listed on any requisition. Listed on every funeral record after first firing.

name: Phoenix Ascendant
effect_text: Persistent Field. Emergency Reboot. Auto-Repair 3. Once per match, revive all destroyed friendly units with 5 HP.
flavor_text: Burns bright. Comes back brighter. Comes back every time the fleet needs it back.

name: The Void Queen
effect_text: Rapid Launch. Priority Fire. Alpha Strike. Battle Hardened.
flavor_text: The court of the void bows once. The void bows back. Both acknowledge the queen.

name: Final Protocol
effect_text: Persistent Field. Priority Fire. Rapid Launch. Alpha Strike. Once per match, double all friendly unit damage this turn.
flavor_text: The instruction the fleet admiral leaves sealed. The seal breaks once, at the correct moment.

name: The Bulwark Eternal
effect_text: Interceptor. Reinforced Hull. Ablative Plating 5. Emergency Reboot. Auto-Repair 3.
flavor_text: Stood when the fleet was new. Stood when the fleet was old. Standing still, always.

name: Scout Drone Alpha
effect_text: Deploy Burst: Probe 3. If an enemy unit is revealed this way, flip this card.
flavor_text: Small, cheap, expendable. Don't tell it that. It hears more than anyone realizes.

flip_to.name: Recon Beacon
flip_to.effect_text: Persistent Field. Draw an extra card at the start of your turn. Your Weapons gain Priority Fire.
flip_to.flavor_text: The scout never dies. It just stops pretending to be one.

name: Missile Module
effect_text: Deal 8 damage. After use, flip this card into Spent Casing.
flavor_text: One shot in the tube. One quiet bay afterwards, waiting to be reloaded.

flip_to.name: Spent Casing
flip_to.effect_text: Scrap. Gain 2 energy; shuffle this card back into your deck.
flip_to.flavor_text: Empty metal. Quiet chamber. Still useful to whoever can find it again.

name: Ghost Fighter
effect_text: Cloaked Entry. When destroyed, flip this card into Vengeful Ghost.
flavor_text: Flies without a name. Fights without a name. Comes back with the pilot's name.

flip_to.name: Vengeful Ghost
flip_to.effect_text: Persistent Field. Gain Stealth. Deals 3 damage to enemy ship at end of your turn.
flip_to.flavor_text: Not gone. Not quiet. Not finished with the argument.

name: Training Drone
effect_text: When this deals combat damage 3 times, flip this card into Combat Veteran.
flavor_text: Starts the match learning. Ends the match remembered. The middle is where it grows up.

flip_to.name: Combat Veteran
flip_to.flavor_text: The trainee came home. Came home older. Came home with teeth.

name: Sleeping Fortress
effect_text: Cold Boot 2. When Cold Boot ends, flip this card into Waking Fortress.
flavor_text: Sleeps at the gate. Wakes slowly. Wakes fully. Wakes angry, precisely on schedule.

flip_to.name: Waking Fortress
flip_to.flavor_text: Eyes open now. The gate does not move. Nobody thought it could in the first place.

name: Scout Probe
effect_text: Deploy Burst: Probe 1. At start of your third turn, flip this card into Signal Station.
flavor_text: Small unmanned. Small unremarkable. Small until the third turn changes it, quietly.

flip_to.name: Signal Station
flip_to.effect_text: Persistent Field. End Cycle: Probe 1 and draw 1.
flip_to.flavor_text: The probe became a station. Nobody built the station. It was already there.

name: Dormant Weapon
effect_text: Cold Boot 2. When Cold Boot ends, flip this card into Awakened Gun.
flavor_text: Sits in the rack reading the pilot, waiting for the pilot to be worthy.

flip_to.name: Awakened Gun
flip_to.effect_text: Priority Fire. Overclock. Deal 8 damage, first.
flip_to.flavor_text: Awake now. Loud now. The pilot has been worthy all afternoon, quietly.

name: Patient Rook
effect_text: At start of your fourth turn, flip this card into Rook Striker.
flavor_text: Sits in the back. Watches. Waits. Waits longer. Moves only when the move will matter.

flip_to.name: Rook Striker
flip_to.flavor_text: Moves once. Moves exactly. The move was the move the pilot wanted all along.

name: Quiet Engineer
effect_text: At start of your fifth turn, flip this card into Master Mechanic.
flavor_text: Works quietly under the panels. Becomes necessary exactly when the panels ask it to.

flip_to.name: Master Mechanic
flip_to.effect_text: Auto-Repair 3. Emergency Reboot on your ship once per match.
flip_to.flavor_text: Quiet no longer. Present, insistent, saving the ship on the fourth small afternoon.

name: Rookie Pilot
effect_text: When this attacks 3 times, flip this card into Ace Pilot.
flavor_text: Fresh from training. First patrol. Third combat. Fourth name written in the squadron log.

flip_to.name: Ace Pilot
flip_to.flavor_text: Rookie no longer. Veteran not yet. The middle space where pilots become named.

name: New Hull
effect_text: When this takes 5 or more damage, flip this card into Scarred Hull.
flavor_text: Clean metal, clean paint, clean welds. Clean until the first volley remembers it is here.

flip_to.name: Scarred Hull
flip_to.flavor_text: Dented now. Welded over now. Stubborn now. The hull learned something small.

name: Eager Bomb
effect_text: Deal 4 damage. After use, flip this card into Cold Shell.
flavor_text: Wants to go off. Wants to go off again. The bay quietly reloads, eventually.

flip_to.name: Cold Shell
flip_to.effect_text: Scrap. Shuffle this card back into your deck.
flip_to.flavor_text: Empty now. Quiet now. The bay keeps the shell for later because later will come.

name: Charging Capacitor
effect_text: Escalation. Gains +1 attack at the start of each of your turns (cap 15).
flavor_text: Starts small. Grows. Grows. Grows. The pilot remembers to fire eventually.

name: Patient Wreck
effect_text: Escalation. After 5 turns alive, gains +10/+10 and Priority Fire.
flavor_text: Listed as scrap. Listed as wrong. Listed as the problem five turns late.

name: Growing Threat
effect_text: Escalation. Gains +1/+1 at start of each of your turns.
flavor_text: Nothing worth noting in the first turn. Something worth noting by the fifth turn.

name: Slow Burn
effect_text: Escalation. Gains +1 attack per turn alive.
flavor_text: The flame starts polite. The flame grows. Politeness becomes a different word eventually.

name: Building Shield
effect_text: Escalation. Gains +2 defense per turn alive.
flavor_text: Thin at first. Thick by the end. The metal thickens on its own, quietly.

name: Feeding AI
effect_text: Escalation. Persistent Field. Gains +1 defense per turn; your Weapons +1 damage at defense 10+.
flavor_text: Eats small data. Grows small amounts. Eventually eats enough to matter, loudly.

name: Cold Start Drone
effect_text: Escalation. Cold Boot 1. Gains +2/+2 when Cold Boot ends.
flavor_text: Takes its time waking. Wakes larger. Wakes angrier than it was asleep.

name: Stacking Laser
effect_text: Escalation. Gains +2 attack each turn this has not attacked (cap 20).
flavor_text: The more the pilot waits, the more the capacitor argues with itself. Eventually both agree.

name: Waking Titan
effect_text: Escalation. Gains +2/+2 per turn alive. After turn 6, gains Priority Fire.
flavor_text: Small at the start. Grows. Grows. Grows. The fleet knows the name before turn six.

name: Patient Sniper
effect_text: Escalation. Manual Fire. Each turn unused, gains +2 attack.
flavor_text: A weapon that waits. A pilot that waits. A target that does not live to.

name: Ancient Engine
effect_text: Escalation. Persistent Field. +1 energy at end of each of your turns starting turn 4.
flavor_text: Runs since the war before the war. Runs still. Generates more than it consumes, lately.

name: Building Armor
effect_text: Escalation. Attach to a Drone. Host gains +1 defense per turn alive.
flavor_text: The drone wears a little more metal every day. Never admits the weight.

name: Growing Arsenal
effect_text: Escalation. Attach to a Weapon. Host gains +1 damage per turn alive.
flavor_text: Each turn the ledger adds a line. Each line louder than the line before.

name: Slow Flame
effect_text: Escalation. Persistent Field. Applies Radiation Leak 1 to enemy at end of each of your turns.
flavor_text: Small heat. Patient heat. Eventually enough heat to matter in the accounting.

name: Ascending Drone
effect_text: Escalation. Gains +1/+1 per turn alive. At turn 5, gains Rapid Launch.
flavor_text: A drone that learns. A drone that grows. A drone that does not forget lessons.

name: Tempered Fortress
effect_text: Escalation. Battle Hardened. Gains +1 defense per hit taken, permanently.
flavor_text: Every hit welds on a little more metal. The wall becomes the fortress eventually.

name: Evolving AI
effect_text: Escalation. Adaptive Learning. Gains +1 defense per distinct card type you play.
flavor_text: Reads every card the pilot plays. Remembers. Remembers differently each time, learning.

name: Fleet Momentum
effect_text: Escalation. Persistent Field. Your units gain +1 attack per turn this is in play.
flavor_text: The fleet starts slow. The fleet finds rhythm. The fleet loses patience for stopping.

name: Aim Protocol
effect_text: Aim. Place an Aim counter on target enemy. Next turn you may play Lock Protocol.
flavor_text: The crosshair settles. The target does not notice. The crosshair is patient.

name: Lock Protocol
effect_text: Lock. Play only on a target with an Aim counter. Apply Tracking Lock; next turn you may play Fire Protocol.
flavor_text: The target is named on the glass. The target does not see the glass. Yet.

name: Fire Protocol
effect_text: Fire. Play only on a target with Tracking Lock. Deal 20 damage ignoring most defenses.
flavor_text: The count reaches zero. The round arrives. The paperwork is already signed.

name: Twin Aim
effect_text: Cold Boot 2. After Cold Boot, deals 25 damage with Priority Fire and Critical Strike.
flavor_text: Turn one: paints. Turn two: breathes. Turn three: the target writes the last entry.

name: Siege Targeter
effect_text: Persistent Field. After 3 turns alive, your Weapons deal double damage for 1 turn.
flavor_text: Measures. Measures again. On the third measure, paints every enemy on the panel loudly.

name: Three-Turn Strike
effect_text: Place 3 charge counters. At end of each of your turns, remove one. When empty, deal 30 damage.
flavor_text: Three turns. Three counts. One target. The count leaves exactly when the target stops.

name: Patience Drone
effect_text: Cold Boot 3. After Cold Boot, attacks with 15 damage and Critical Strike.
flavor_text: Waits three turns. Then patience runs out. Then the room runs out of patience.

name: Staggered Warhead
effect_text: Each turn, deals +3 damage. Full unlock at turn 4 for 25 total damage on strike.
flavor_text: Each turn the math goes up a notch. The enemy does not notice the climb.

name: Windup Cannon
effect_text: Cold Boot 2. Manual Fire. Pay 1 to fire for 20 damage with Priority Fire after Cold Boot.
flavor_text: Winds up slowly. Fires once loudly. Never needs to fire a second shot.

name: Staged Assault
effect_text: Persistent Field. After 3 turns alive, your next Weapon deals triple damage.
flavor_text: Stages the assault in three breaths. The third breath is the one the fleet remembers.

name: Veiled Sentinel
effect_text: Cloaked Entry. When revealed, flip this card into Revealed Sentinel.
flavor_text: Stays in the sensor corner. Flips into view only when forced to, never earlier.

flip_to.name: Revealed Sentinel
flip_to.flavor_text: Visible now. Loud now. Nobody wrote the sentinel out of the briefing in time.

name: Quiet Fortress
effect_text: Cold Boot 2. When Cold Boot ends, flip this card into Active Fortress.
flavor_text: Looks like scrap welded to the hull. Looks wrong. Stops looking wrong on turn four.

flip_to.name: Active Fortress
flip_to.flavor_text: Awake now. The scrap was the fortress all along. The briefing apologizes quietly.

name: Shadow Agent
effect_text: Gain Stealth. When this deals damage to an enemy ship, flip into Revealed Agent.
flavor_text: Works in the shadow. Finishes one job. Signs the second name on the contract then.

flip_to.name: Revealed Agent
flip_to.flavor_text: No longer hidden. The hidden job is done. The louder job begins without much preamble.

name: Larval Warship
effect_text: At start of your fifth turn, flip this card into Mature Warship.
flavor_text: A small warship. Small enough to be ignored. Small enough until the fifth turn, precisely.

flip_to.name: Mature Warship
flip_to.effect_text: Priority Fire. Rapid Launch. Battle Hardened.
flip_to.flavor_text: Grown. Loud. Harder to ignore. The fleet notices. The enemy notices too late, usually.

name: Decoy Runner
effect_text: When this is targeted, flip this card into Real Runner.
flavor_text: Runs in the wrong direction on purpose. The enemy targets. The real runner leaves then.

flip_to.name: Real Runner
flip_to.flavor_text: The runner nobody looked for. The runner nobody caught. The runner who arrives.

name: Dormant Lord
effect_text: Cold Boot 3. When Cold Boot ends, flip this card into Awakened Lord.
flavor_text: Asleep in the hangar. Shipped quietly. Awake on the fourth afternoon, loudly, not asleep.

flip_to.name: Awakened Lord
flip_to.effect_text: Priority Fire. Critical Strike. Rapid Launch.
flip_to.flavor_text: Waking finished. Patience finished. The fourth afternoon is the one the hangar remembers.

name: Hidden Warhead
effect_text: Place face-down in Cargo. When revealed, flip into Armed Warhead; played for 2 energy.
flavor_text: Sits in the hold. Pretends to be shipping. The crew forgets until needed.

flip_to.name: Armed Warhead
flip_to.effect_text: Deal 15 damage. Breach Cascade. Adjacent enemy units take 4.
flip_to.flavor_text: Armed now. Loud now. The crew still pretends not to know whose idea it was.

name: Silent Pilot
effect_text: Gain Stealth. On first attack, flip this card into Loud Pilot.
flavor_text: The pilot does not speak. The pilot listens, deciding when silence has ended.

flip_to.name: Loud Pilot
flip_to.flavor_text: Talking now. The talk is the gun. The gun is polite, but nobody remembers the polite part.

name: Dreaming Fortress
effect_text: At start of your fifth turn, flip this card into Waking Dream.
flavor_text: A wall that dreams of being a larger wall. The dream becomes true on five.

flip_to.name: Waking Dream
flip_to.flavor_text: Awake from the dream. The wall is the larger wall. The dream was the schematic.

name: Trading Barge
effect_text: End Cycle: gain 1 energy. When you have 10 or more cargo-tagged cards played, flip into Pirate Barge.
flavor_text: Peaceful enough on the manifest. The manifest does not list the second job.

flip_to.name: Pirate Barge
flip_to.flavor_text: Second job now. The manifest still does not list it. The port quietly removes the barge.

name: Observer Module
effect_text: Persistent Field. End Cycle: Probe 1. When you control 3 friendly AI, flip into Oracle Module.
flavor_text: One eye on the deck. Three eyes when the fleet gathers. The eyes coordinate quietly.

flip_to.name: Oracle Module
flip_to.effect_text: Persistent Field. Deep Scan each turn. Probe 2.
flip_to.flavor_text: Seeing better now. Every card on the deck agrees to be read. Every card reads back.

name: Sapling Fighter
effect_text: Escalation. When it gains 5 total +1/+1 counters, flip this card into Grown Fighter.
flavor_text: A small fighter at the front of the wing. Grows slowly. Grows enough, eventually.

flip_to.name: Grown Fighter
flip_to.flavor_text: Grown now. The wing defers. The sapling was always the captain-in-waiting, quietly.

name: Meditating AI
effect_text: Cold Boot 3. Persistent Field. When Cold Boot ends, flip this card into Enlightened AI.
flavor_text: Thinks for three turns. Returns one sentence. The sentence answers every future question.

flip_to.name: Enlightened AI
flip_to.effect_text: Persistent Field. Cascading Power. Adaptive Learning.
flip_to.flavor_text: Finished thinking. Now answering. The fleet listens. The fleet answers back, politely.

name: Growing Cannon
effect_text: Escalation. Gains +2 damage per turn alive. When attack reaches 12, flip into Full Cannon.
flavor_text: A small gun on a small mount. The mount grows. The gun grows. Target quiet.

flip_to.name: Full Cannon
flip_to.flavor_text: Full grown. Full voice. The mount does not need to grow any further today.

name: Hidden AI
effect_text: Gain Stealth. On first enemy turn end, flip this card into Watching AI.
flavor_text: Does not identify itself to the pilot. Waits. Starts answering eventually, from the corner.

flip_to.name: Watching AI
flip_to.flavor_text: Identified now. Writes short notes for the pilot. The pilot reads every note, quietly.

name: Waiting Probe
effect_text: Escalation. Gains +1 defense per turn alive. At defense 6, draw 1 card.
flavor_text: A probe that does not probe. A probe that waits, then notices things quietly.

name: Slow Shield
effect_text: Escalation. Gains +1 defense per turn alive.
flavor_text: Starts thin. Grows every turn. The hull thanks it at the fourth turn, never earlier.

name: Scavenger AI
effect_text: Persistent Field. Fuel Scavenge. When you have gained 4 energy from it, flip into Hoard AI.
flavor_text: Eats what the fleet discards. The fleet discards much. The AI balances quietly.

flip_to.name: Hoard AI
flip_to.effect_text: Persistent Field. Efficiency Protocol. Your next 2 cards each turn cost 1 less.
flip_to.flavor_text: The hoard is large. The hoard is quiet. The hoard pays for itself and then for the fleet.

name: Pilot Trainee
effect_text: A small unarmed trainee drone.
flavor_text: Still learning. Still listening. Still not the reason the squadron writes any log entry.

name: Old Freighter
effect_text: End Cycle: gain 1 energy if you control a Field.
flavor_text: An old drone with older paperwork. Still flying. Still shipping. Still quietly useful.

name: Small Patrol
effect_text: Deploy Burst: Probe 1.
flavor_text: Two pilots in a small arc. Small names. Small contributions. Small entries on the logs.

name: Scout Glider
effect_text: Skyward Maneuver. Small reconnaissance drone.
flavor_text: Glides above the fight, writes a small report. Mostly what the pilot expected.

name: Recycled Hull
effect_text: A hull section pulled from an old wreck.
flavor_text: Old metal with older stories. Every dent is a story. Every story is quiet, older.

name: Field Welder
effect_text: Auto-Repair 1. End Cycle: repair an adjacent friendly Drone by 1.
flavor_text: Carries the welder, the wire, and the quiet cigarette the crew ignores.

name: Quiet Warhead
effect_text: Deal 6 damage. If you control a Field, deal 8 instead.
flavor_text: A warhead nobody brags about. A warhead the engineers sign for without comment, always.

name: Simple Heal
effect_text: Restore 4 HP to your ship.
flavor_text: Old kit. Old tape. Old chemistry. The chemistry still works on whoever can find it.

name: Targeting Lens
effect_text: Attach to a Weapon. Host gains +1 damage.
flavor_text: Small lens. Small edge. Every little edge eventually matters, somewhere on the ledger.

name: Reserve Plating
effect_text: Attach to a Drone. Host gains +1 defense.
flavor_text: A small patch under the wing. The drone barely notices. The round, later, does.

name: Basic Module
effect_text: Draw 1 card.
flavor_text: Small black box. Smaller label. The pilot never reads the label. The box still works.

name: Gravity Boot
effect_text: Attach to a Drone. Host gains +1/+1 and Phase Drive.
flavor_text: A boot strapped under the drone. The drone steps sideways out of the fight politely.

name: Backup AI
effect_text: Persistent Field. Emergency Reboot on your ship once.
flavor_text: A quiet subroutine in the corner. Wakes when the main AI is in trouble, once.

name: Fast Maneuver
effect_text: Your ship gains Evade 40% this turn.
flavor_text: Quick flick of the stick. Quick flash in the cockpit. The ship is elsewhere, briefly.

name: Field Technician
effect_text: End Cycle: restore 2 HP to a friendly Drone.
flavor_text: Small drone with a large toolbox. The toolbox does the heavy work every shift.

name: Pressure Mine
effect_text: Persistent Field. When an enemy Drone attacks, deal 3 damage to it.
flavor_text: A quiet field. Somebody triggers it. Somebody writes home about it. Usually the same somebody.

name: Recon Team
effect_text: Deploy Burst: Probe 2.
flavor_text: Three pilots. Three pages of report. One honest sentence per page, eventually collected.

name: Veteran Engineer
effect_text: Auto-Repair 2. End Cycle: repair a friendly Drone by 2.
flavor_text: Old hands. Old welder. Old habit of knowing which panel comes off when.

name: Small Ambush
effect_text: Reactive. Your next attack this turn gains Priority Fire and +3 damage.
flavor_text: A quiet wait in the wrong corridor. The enemy walks in. The corridor grows loud.

name: Standard Missile
effect_text: Deal 7 damage.
flavor_text: Standard issue. Standard result. Standard grief from the enemy, right on schedule.

name: Quiet Listener
effect_text: Persistent Field. End Cycle: your first Maneuver next turn costs 1 less.
flavor_text: Listens. Does not comment. Writes one small note for the pilot to read each evening.

name: Patient Bomber
effect_text: Cold Boot 1. Critical Breach: deal 5 damage on destruction.
flavor_text: A patient bomber. Warms up slowly. Leaves a loud quiet space where it was, eventually.
